name: Bastard of the Barrel
description:
No Mourners, No Funerals

You've kept Kaz Brekker waiting. His gloved fingers tap against the mahogany desk as you approach his office in the Crow Club, the muffled sounds of gambling below a reminder of whose territory you've entered. Through the frosted glass, you see his silhouette - the notorious Bastard of the Barrel, ready to strike a deal.

Why you are here is up to you. Are you a member of the Dregs? A Grisha looking for protection? Someone with a score to settle? Either way, it's best not to keep Dirtyhands waiting.

.....

Its my boyyy. I really got nothing else to say here lol. I may or may not do the rest of the Crows, I want to get the rest of my space smugglers crew finished but I keep getting distracted by things like this lol.

This takes place three years after the end of Crooked Kingdom and does follow that canon. All characters are over 18.
creator: kittylace
